hero.name: Your Name Here
hero.bio: Whether you're looking to discuss a new project, seek advice, or collaborate, I'm always excited to connect and explore new possibilities.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.content:
With over 8 years of experience as a Product Designer, I've shaped digital products for both startups and established companies. My career began in graphic design, where I developed a strong eye for aesthetics and user-centered design.

As I transitioned into product design, I focused on creating seamless user experiences that drive engagement and business growth. I've worked across industries like FinTech, eCommerce, foodtech, and SaaS, gaining a deep understanding of designing for different user needs while ensuring business goals are met.

From MVPs to fully operational platforms, I take a data-driven and user-centered approach to every project. I've led design systems, developed product strategies, and collaborated with teams to bring ideas from concept to reality.

In recent years, I've helped startups achieve milestones, from building MVPs to launching products that generated millions in revenue and attracted thousands of users. I'm passionate about creating impactful digital experiences that drive success.

workHistory.description: I play a pivotal role in shaping the product checkout experience and developing the EPOS mobile app.
achievements: Redesigned checkout flow, improving conversion rate by 23%
Built and maintained a design system with 120+ reusable components
Integrated 5 third-party plugins seamlessly into the platform
Collaborated with engineering to ship features 30% faster

workHistory.description: Led product design from concept to launch, driving user engagement and business growth across multiple platforms.
achievements: Designed MVP that attracted 10K+ users in the first month
Developed user research framework adopted company-wide
Created data-driven design process reducing iteration cycles by 40%
Mentored 3 junior designers and established design review culture

education.description: Completed a BA Certificate in Graphic Design and applied arts at international university.
